notes:
I only tried the demo version to make sure it would work before I purchased. I tried with the recommended version of Proton, Experimental, and 9.04. All of them failed. I get the following Crash screen upon load.

YsX has crashed. If this issue persists, please report it on the game's technical support forum.

It could help us greatly if you provide the crash dump files with your report, located here:
C:/users/steamuser/AppData/Local/Temp/YsX/2025-0-25_01-19-52_1.0.8+288-292
(This storage path was copied to the clipboard)

We are sorry for any inconvenience caused.


Has anyone else ran into this?
